title: centella glochidiata
intro: Centella glochidiata, also known as Indian pennywort, is a type of flowering plant in the family Apiaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects, making it useful in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Centella glochidiata include improved cognitive function, enhanced skin health, and reduced stress levels, among others. Centella glochidiata is often used to prepare herbal teas, capsules, and tinctures, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
